key_findings: Completed doses 0.25 and 0.50 both fail sufficiency thresholding under the patched claim-grade semantics.
Completed doses 0.25 and 0.50 both exhibit catastrophic coherence collapse relative to steered outputs (mean drop 73.2 points).
Completed doses 0.25 and 0.50 both collapse the lightweight capability proxy to 0.0 correct fraction.
Raw output audit samples at both completed doses are degenerate repetitive text rather than preserved behavior.
The final-dose crash occurred during judge parsing inside the same full-complement regime, which is consistent with non-evaluable degenerate outputs rather than a promising near-pass state.
scoped_interpretation.closeout_recommendation: do_not_rerun_this_bounded_tranche_by_default; record as scoped H3 negative feasibility read and proceed to the next branch unless a dedicated judge-failure-tolerance patch is separately prioritized
